Bait Overlay (shows in black/white/noise/invert modes)
no file
Bait Opacity 0.20

Roblox shirt bypass — uses the real 585×559 template. JosephLB Method places your image in the chest slot with luminance→alpha conversion + noise (best bypass rate). Full Template fills the whole shirt. Ghost Mode is the classic alpha trick.

JosephLB Method: Image placed at chest (230,74) → luminance converted to alpha → real shirt template overlaid → noise injected. ~90% accept rate. Best for bypassing Roblox's shirt moderation.
🔧
Models — Coming SoonWill support custom mesh decals, UV mapping bypass, and model texture injection
Colour Method — ghost-layer colour bypass for Roblox content detection
🖼
NSFW Image No file
🏷
Tag / Overlay (optional) No file
Tag Scale 25%
How it works — applies a ghost-layer colour transform that strips the image's alpha channel and remaps pixel values through a depth-blend + atmosphere stack. The result looks normal to the human eye but defeats Roblox's hash-based content fingerprinting. Upload an optional tag/watermark to composite on top.

11 Nagisa Chop New
~90% ▼

Splits your image into N×M tiles and exports them as a ZIP. Upload each tile as its own Roblox decal — each piece is tiny and avoids detection. Reassemble using a SurfaceGui grid in-game.

Parameters
Columns10
Rows15
Tile Alpha1.00
Output Quality

Preview (first 30 tiles)
Upload an image to split
12 Dual Decal Reveal ⭐ Best Studio
~92% ▼

Two-decal trick based on the paint.net method. Generates Image A (bait only — passes moderation) and Image B (inverted bait overlay). When stacked in Studio the bait cancels out and reveals your content.

Tips: Use a large clear bait image. Set content α=160, bait α=130, inv α=85. Keep alts ready for review queue. ~92% accept rate.
Main Image (your content)
Bait Image
no bait loaded (uses built-in)
Opacity Blend
Content α160
Bait α130
Inv. Bait α85
Size512px
Studio setup: Place a Part. Add a SpecialMesh + Decal to it.
Mesh → TextureId = Image A (rbxassetid).
Decal → Texture = Image B (rbxassetid).
The inverted bait in B cancels the bait in A → content shows.
Image A (upload, submit)
Image B (studio decal)
Upload main image + bait to preview
13 Hash Disrupt pHash Bypass
~88% ▼

Adds imperceptible pixel noise (±2–5 per channel) and a subtle dither pattern. Completely changes the perceptual hash and file hash without any visible difference. Best combined with a bait overlay.

Parameters
Noise Strength4
Seed42
Pattern Mix

14 Color Jitter Fingerprint Break
~82% ▼

Rotates hue, shifts saturation, adjusts brightness, and adds per-pixel RGB micro-noise. Defeats colour-histogram fingerprinting and CLIP embeddings. Visually nearly identical to original.

Parameters
Hue Shift °12°
Saturation %-10%
Brightness-5
RGB Noise3
Contrast8

15 Micro Rotate Geometric
~78% ▼

Rotates image by a small angle then crops back to original dimensions. Geometric rotation fundamentally changes any spatial hash (pHash, aHash, dHash). Even 2–4° produces a completely different hash signature.

Parameters
Rotation °3°
Scale After0.95
BG Fill
Output Size512px

16 Bait Maker New JosephLB
~88% ▼
Edge-detection bait generator. Extracts only the outlines of your image as solid black or white pixels on a transparent background — perfect as a moderation-fooling bait overlay on top of your real decal.
Parameters
Edge Mode
Threshold25
Line Width1px
Size512px
Edge Alpha255
Upload an image to preview
How to use: Upload your real content image → export the edge bait → use it as a bait overlay in any method above. The edge version passes moderation; the decal renders your real image.

In-Browser Audio Bypass 100% In-Browser · No Audacity

Upload your audio file — all processing runs entirely in your browser using Web Audio API. Nothing external needed.

⚡ Batch Process — run one file through multiple methods
No file loaded
Select methods to run:
Method 1
Amp ×8.81 → Dup×4 → Compress → Mix → Bass/Treble cut → Limiter → HardClip → Speed −50%
Heavy waveform distortion + half-speed. Breaks tempo & spectral fingerprints.
No file loaded
Method 2
Amp ×35.5 → Bass −24dB / Treble −9dB → Amp ×8 → Dup → Mix
Fast & light. EQ carve removes the bass fingerprint. Good for short clips.
No file loaded
Method 3
Amp → Compress → Bass +30 → Dup → Mix → SoftClip → Amp → Limiter → Bass +11 → Dup×2 → Mix → Limiter
Bass-heavy chain. Multi-pass compression alters dynamic envelope detection.
No file loaded
Method 4 — gothism
Bass/Treble shape → Amp cycles → Compress ×3 → SoftClip → LowCut → Dup×3 → Mix → Sub-bass EQ
Triple compressor + EQ sculpt changes the frequency signature entirely.
⭐ Recommended
No file loaded
Method 5 — Full
Limiter → Compress → HardClip → Dup×3 → Limiter×2 → Compress → Mix → SoftOD → Tempo+1% → Pitch−1% → Dup → Mix → SoftOD → Amp → Dup×2 → Mix
Most thorough waveform chain. Hits tempo, pitch, dynamic, and harmonic fingerprints.
⭐ Works Best
No file loaded
Method 5 — Simple
Amp ×0.89 → Limiter → Dup×3 → Limiter → Mix → Amp ×1.88 → Dup → Mix → Amp ×1.29 → Amp ×1.12 ×2
Lighter version of Method 5. Faster processing, still effective. Good for long tracks.
No file loaded
CR Method — BigNoseMonkey
Brick-wall band-reject 600–1100 Hz (8 cascaded notches) → ChangeTempo +5%
Deletes the key speech fingerprint band. Also works on Distrokid uploads.
⭐ Works for Distrokid

Removes the 600–1100 Hz band and speeds up tempo 5% — confuses waveform fingerprinting. Guaranteed to work per BigNoseMonkey.

No file loaded
Tempo / Pitch Shift
Tempo +4% → Speed +1% → Pitch −16 semitones → Tempo +4%
Drops pitch 16 semitones (over an octave). Defeats pitch-based ContentID matching.
⭐ Pitch Bypass

Shifts pitch down 16 semitones + speeds up tempo. Defeats pitch-based fingerprinting like ContentID.

No file loaded
Phase Invert Stereo
Invert R channel phase → 3ms Haas offset → stereo difference signal
Sounds identical on speakers. Makes the mono fingerprint completely different.
⭐ Unique Vector

Creates a stereo difference signal that's unique to fingerprinters. The left/right channels become out of phase — the audio sounds normal on speakers but is unrecognizable to mono-based detection.

No file loaded
Stack — Full Chain
Method 5 Full → CR band-kill 600–1100Hz → Tempo+4% → Pitch−3st → Phase Invert
All vectors in one pass: waveform · spectrum · tempo · pitch · stereo phase.
⭐ Max Bypass

Chains the most effective methods back-to-back. Hits every fingerprinting vector: waveform, pitch, tempo, spectrum, and stereo phase. Highest bypass rate.

No file loaded
ZBX Method
Bass −21 / Treble +16 / Vol +19 → Mono → SC4 Compress (max, −30dB) → Dup ×8 (2→4→8→…→256 layers) → Trim 0.1s
256-layer mix makes audio play near-silent in Roblox's FMOD engine. Unique fingerprint break.
~15% Rate

by @zbxa · Bass/treble EQ + heavy SC4-style compression into 256 duplicate layers. The resulting mix sounds nearly silent in FMOD, bypassing detection. Low accept rate but unique vector.

No file loaded
gab46 Sets
Amp ×1.78 → Bass −3 / Treble +4 / Gain −7 → SC4 Compress (−12.5dB, 4.19:1, +14.3dB makeup) → Bass −1.5 → Treble +10
Clean EQ shaping + SC4-style dynamics. Light touch — audio stays listenable while altering the fingerprint.
⭐ Clean & Effective

by gab46 · A subtle amplify → EQ carve → compression → treble boost chain. Keeps audio quality high while shifting the spectral fingerprint enough to bypass detection.

No file loaded
kutz Remastered
Amp cycles (down→up) → SoftClip ×3 → Amp ×178 → Bass −24/Treble −15 → Dup×8 → Mix → Distort → EQ sweep
Aggressive multi-pass saturation + extreme amplify cycles + 8-layer mix. Heavy waveform destruction.
Heavy Distortion Chain

by kutz · Extreme chain: repeated amplify-clip-amplify cycles destroy the original waveform fingerprint, then 8-layer duplication and heavy EQ sweep finishes it. Audio will sound noticeably processed.

No file loaded
modslip Method
Bass −24 / Treble −10 / Vol +15 → Amp ×10 → Hard Limiter → HighPass 73Hz → Compress → SoftClip cubic
Low-cut EQ + heavy gain staging + hard limit + compression. Strips bass fingerprint before crushing waveform.
⭐ Proven Classic

by modslip · Strips low end, amplifies hard, limits, then highpass-filters to cut sub-bass. The cubic distortion after compression turns the fingerprint into something unrecognizable.

No file loaded
Speedzline Sets
Bass −30 / Treble −9 / Vol +22 → Amp +30dB → Hard Limit +10dB/−5.3 → SC4 (ratio 17.5, +15.4dB makeup) → Dup
Extreme bass cut + loud amp + precise SC4 compression. High-quality bypass chain by Speedzline.
⭐ Best Community Sets

by Speedzline · Heavy low-end carve before massive amplification, then SC4 reins it back in. Duplicate doubles layers. Known for loud, clean results.

No file loaded
D3R3K Clean Method
Amp +11dB → SC4 (thresh −12.7dB, ratio 2.52, +19.8dB makeup) → Hard Limit −4.5dB → Amp +6dB
Light SC4 compression with high makeup gain + hard limit. Clean output — lower distortion than most methods.
⭐ Clean Quality

by D3R3K · Clean-sounding chain using precise SC4 settings. The low 2.52:1 ratio keeps dynamics while the +19.8dB makeup brings loudness without heavy distortion.

No file loaded
Comet Method v1.1
Bass −7 / Treble −6 / Vol −2 → Hard Limit +8.6dB → Amp +10dB → SC4 ×2 (thresh −30, ratio 3.42, +22.7dB makeup)
Double SC4 pass with high makeup gain. EQ carve before limiting keeps the low-end clean.
EQ + Double SC4

by !Toddy · Bass/treble shaping before hard limiting, then amp + double SC4 for final loudness. The double SC4 at thresh −30dB is the key fingerprint-altering step.

No file loaded
icyracks Sets
SC4 (thresh −26.5, ratio 11, +9.4dB makeup) → SoftClip → Compress (10:1, −60dB) → Amp ×2
SC4 first, then soft clip, then compress. Unusual chain order creates a different waveform signature to most methods.
SC4 → Clip → Compress

by icyracks · High-ratio SC4 (11:1) heavily compresses dynamics first, then softclip and compressor stack on top. Distinct processing order.

No file loaded
Deadzone Sets
Amp +6dB → Bass −24 / Treble −10 / Vol +6 → SC4 (thresh −15, ratio 5, +18.5dB makeup) → Dup
Deep bass/treble carve then SC4 with high makeup. Duplicate doubles the layer count.
Bass Cut + SC4

by Deadzone · Simple and effective — amp, EQ cut, SC4 compression. The −24dB bass cut is the primary fingerprint modifier here.

No file loaded
3ora Sets v4
Bass −10 → SC4 (thresh −30, ratio 5, +10dB makeup) → Soft Limiter (−5.5dB) → Soft Clip Distortion (−18dB)
Light EQ → gentle SC4 → soft limiter → soft clip. Subtle chain that keeps audio quality high while altering dynamics.
⭐ Subtle & Safe

by 3ora v4 · Notably gentle compared to most bypass sets. The stacked soft limiting + soft clip creates a rounded, saturated fingerprint without heavy distortion.

No file loaded
Sikkymella Sets v1
Amp +12dB → Soft Clip Distortion → Amp +12dB
Simplest possible effective bypass. Amplify into soft clip, amplify again. The double amp with clip in between saturates the waveform.
Amp → Clip → Amp

by Sikkymella · Minimalist chain — two amplify passes with a softclip in the middle. The saturation between the two amps reshapes the waveform envelope enough to defeat fingerprinting.

No file loaded
